message.reasoning:
We need to output JSON only with shape: {"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{...},"acquired_fact_ids":[],"readiness_state":"..."} . If not tool_call, no tool_call field? Actually spec: When kind is tool_call, tool_call.tool_name must exist. Otherwise omit tool_call? It says "Do not invent helper tools... When kind is tool_call, tool_call.tool_name must exactly match one of the registered tool names". So we need to decide next action. Based on frontier recommendations: expand_file [F1] priority=112. So we should perform a tool_call session.expand_file@v1 with appropriate payload. The payload includes target selector and optional depth, limit, etc. Need to provide payload JSON with fields as per tool contract. The contract: session.expand_file@v1: Payload with target selector and optional depth, limit, relation filters, priority threshold, and traversal budgets. So we need to include at least target_selector. Probably also depth? The frontier suggests expand_file with target_selector. Let's use payload: {"target_selector":"F1"} maybe also depth? Not required but can include optional fields. Use minimal.

We also need to fill acquired_fact_ids: list of fact ids we have acquired? We haven't read any exact text yet. Could be empty array. readiness_state: probably "evidence_visible" or "not_ready"? Since we are about to expand file to get evidence. The state likely "evidence_visible" after acquisition? Actually readiness_state indicates whether we have enough evidence to edit. We haven't yet. So maybe "evidence_visible" after we expand? But we haven't acquired yet. The spec says "readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit". We currently have not yet acquired evidence; maybe it's "evidence_visible"? Actually we have some visible nodes but not the exact constants. I think "evidence_visible" indicates we have some evidence visible but not enough? Might be okay. Let's set readiness_state to "evidence_visible". assistant_message brief status: "Expanding artifacts.rs to capture schema version constants". Provide tool_call.

Thus output JSON:

{
  "kind":"tool_call",
  "assistant_message":"Expanding artifacts.rs to capture schema version constants",
  "tool_call":{"tool_name":"session.expand_file@v1","payload":{"target_selector":"F1"}},
  "acquired_fact_ids":[],
  "readiness_state":"evidence_visible"
}

Make sure JSON only, no extra. Ensure fields exactly as required. The shape: {{"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{{}}}},"acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}}. So we need to include tool_call with nested payload object. Ensure proper JSON syntax: double quotes. No extra commas. Provide acquired_fact_ids as array; we have none, so [].

Thus final.
